event.description:
Teppei Tosa gives a talk on Scala Active Records.

Teppei Tosa is a manager of Research and Development Department in MUIT, which is MUFG's (Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group) IT company.

Scala-ActiveRecord is an ORM library for Scala and is created by Japanese engineers. It provides the operability like Ruby-on-Rails-ActiveRecord and the advantage of type-safe. In this talk, Teppei will show the feature, the background and how to use it.

Schedule:

6:30-7:00 - networking 7:00-7:10 - announcements etc 7:10-~8:40 - Teppei talk 8:40-9:00 - networking
event.title: Scala-ActiveRecord: Type-Safe Active Record model for Scala
